title: Selling Digital Art Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital artist in Nigeria or Ghana, your PayPal account is blocked. You're not alone. Many creators in restricted countries face this issue, wondering how to sell digital art without PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. It's a frustrating experience, but there's a solution. In this post, we'll compare the options, exposing the truth about PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and their country restrictions. We'll explore the limitations of these platforms and reveal a permanent structural alternative. You'll learn how to overcome these obstacles and start selling digital art, ebooks, courses, and other digital products without restrictions. It's time to take control of your sales.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip offer a range of features, but they're not all created equal. PayPal is a payments giant, but it's not available in many countries, including Nigeria and Ghana. Stripe is a popular payment processor, but it requires KYC checks, which can be a barrier for some creators. Gumroad is a digital marketplace, but it has a long list of blocked countries, including Pakistan and Bangladesh. These platforms promise flexibility, but they're often restrictive, limiting your ability to sell digital art and other digital products. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offer a comprehensive solution, allowing you to sell digital products without restrictions, KYC, or subscriptions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have country restrictions, blocking creators in specific regions from using their services. These restrictions can be frustrating, especially for digital artists in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other restricted countries. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle are designed to handle restricted countries, providing a seamless payment experience without KYC checks or country restrictions. This means you can sell digital art, ebooks, and other digital products to customers worldwide, without worrying about blocked countries or restricted services.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have their own set of rules. PayPal charges high fees, while Stripe requires a KYC check, which can delay payments. Gumroad has a long list of fees, including transaction fees, payment processing fees, and more. In contrast, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle offer fast, secure payments, with no fees, no KYC checks, and no subscriptions. This means you can keep more of your earnings, without worrying about hidden fees or delayed payments.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are crucial for digital artists and creators. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all offer some level of automation, but they often fall short. NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, offer comprehensive automation and delivery capabilities, allowing you to sell digital products without manual intervention. This means you can focus on what you do best – creating digital art – while the Full Stack Bundle handles the rest.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're tired of PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip's country restrictions, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle are the clear winners. With the Full Stack Bundle, you get everything you need to sell digital art, ebooks, and other digital products without restrictions, KYC checks, or subscriptions. This comprehensive solution includes Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard, priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, all for one payment of $79.99. Don't wait any longer – take control of your sales and start selling digital art today.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
